Petition To Compel First And Final Account And Completion Of Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Antonio Bautista appearing for and with administrator. Charles Maguire appearing for moving party Lois Hanns. Her Attorney-in-Fact Colette Hanns is in court. Mr. Bautista agrees tp file a first and final accounting. He agrees to pay $2,500.00 to Ms. Hanns for attorney's fee. He is working on having the stocks transfer to the beneficiaries. Court is granting the petition in part. The administrator is to file his first and final account in 60 days. Court reserves determination of payment of petitioner's attorney fees. Neither the administrator or counsel should take further fees without court order. Court is setting a status date on 7/10. Mr. Maguire raises the storage fee issue. It is not part of his petition and he will need to amend his petition to include it. Order signed with modifications. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
